retry_reason: Put operation is unconditional and cannot fail; retry is not applicable.
contract_summary: This function is a put wrapper that decrements the reference count of the acpi_data_node associated with the device's data (via &dev->data). It should be called when removing sysfs files from the ACPI device, representing the release of a reference. After this call, the data node may be freed if its reference count reaches zero, and the caller must not access it further.

judge.reason: Entire function body is a single call to a known put function (acpi_hide_nondev_subnodes), which decrements a kref refcount. No other logic exists.
